scope_note: This report consolidates iterations 3 through 100 into one local hardening pass. It closes several critical and high-risk local findings, but it does not claim that all production readiness work is complete because several items require staging infrastructure, production credentials, live database profiling, or organizational approval.

findings.title: No repository-level hardening workflow existed
evidence: Repository discovery found no .github/workflows production gate before this pass
Tests, SAST, Flutter smoke tests, and dependency audits had to be run manually
findings.root_cause: No checked-in CI orchestration for the multi-service repo
findings.recommended_follow_up: Run the workflow in GitHub Actions and tune any environment-specific failures

findings.title: Python direct dependencies had known vulnerabilities
evidence: pip-audit initially flagged vulnerable direct requirements in Scouting AI and Chatbot
Django 5.2.1 and sqlparse 0.5.3 were vulnerable in chatbot/chatbot/requirements.txt
python-jose introduced vulnerable transitive dependency pressure in scouting-ai-service
findings.root_cause: Dependency versions were not continuously audited or upgraded
findings.recommended_follow_up: Add full lockfile/SBOM generation and transitive release artifact scanning

findings.title: Scouting JWT helpers used python-jose dependency family
findings.root_cause: Legacy JWT implementation dependency had not been revisited
findings.recommended_follow_up: Standardize service JWT issuer/audience validation across Spring and FastAPI services

findings.title: N8N service executor classified timeout failures as generic connection errors
evidence: n8n-service-orchestration/webhooks/service_executor.py handled httpx.RequestError before explicit timeout classification
findings.recommended_follow_up: Add end-to-end webhook tests with a real delayed service

findings.title: Python services emitted deprecated naive UTC timestamps
findings.root_cause: Timezone-aware timestamp convention was not enforced
findings.recommended_follow_up: Adopt a shared timestamp helper and structured JSON log format

findings.title: Bandit reported actionable chatbot and admin-platform security findings
evidence: MD5 hashing used for API-key rate-limit cache names and model fingerprints
Remote model download path used urlretrieve without explicit HTTPS validation
Exceptions were swallowed silently in model and notification code
findings.root_cause: Security linting was not part of regular development workflow
findings.fix_status: fixed for scanned Python app/service directories
findings.recommended_follow_up: Keep Bandit in CI and add a policy for accepted nosec exceptions

fixes_implemented.title: Add GitHub Actions production hardening gates
changes: Added Spring backend test job with Maven cache and demo seed packaging check
Added Python matrix for Scouting AI, Academy Ranking AI, N8N support code, and Django chatbot tests
Added Bandit SAST job logic per Python service
Added Flutter widget smoke-test job
Added pip-audit and Maven dependency-resolution audit job
Added weekly Dependabot updates for Actions, Maven, pip, and pub
fixes_implemented.rollback: Remove the workflow and dependabot files; local code remains compatible

fixes_implemented.title: Patch vulnerable direct Python requirements
changes: Pinned FastAPI to a clean version used by the audited services
Updated python-dotenv, python-multipart, pytest, Django, and sqlparse
Replaced python-jose with PyJWT in Scouting AI service requirements
fixes_implemented.rollback: Revert requirement pins only if a compatibility issue is found, then document and patch the replacement version

fixes_implemented.title: Migrate Scouting JWT helpers to PyJWT and fail closed outside local modes
changes: Replaced jose JWT operations with PyJWT
Added timezone-aware token timestamps
Kept fallback JWT secrets only for dev, local, and test environments
Added token round-trip and invalid-token regression tests
fixes_implemented.rollback: Restore python-jose import and requirement, but this would reintroduce audit risk

fixes_implemented.title: Classify N8N timeouts explicitly
changes: Added explicit httpx.TimeoutException handling
Added regression coverage that asserts timeout error_type is preserved
fixes_implemented.rollback: Revert the service executor and regression test

fixes_implemented.title: Use timezone-aware UTC timestamps in Python services
changes: Replaced datetime.utcnow() with datetime.now(timezone.utc)
Updated JWT expiration and issued-at claims to use aware datetimes
fixes_implemented.rollback: Revert timestamp changes if a consumer cannot parse timezone-bearing ISO strings

fixes_implemented.title: Burn down Python Bandit findings in scanned service directories
changes: Changed non-cryptographic MD5 usage to SHA-256
Added HTTPS scheme validation before model download
Added model and dataset revision controls for Hugging Face loads
Replaced silent exception swallowing with logger warnings
Recorded a zero-finding Bandit report for scanned directories
fixes_implemented.rollback: Revert individual service changes and rerun Bandit to confirm the accepted risk

fixes_implemented.title: Add local hardening check runner
changes: Added a PowerShell runner for Maven, pytest, Flutter, Bandit, pip-audit, and seed packaging checks
Documented dependency audit release gates and remaining SBOM work
fixes_implemented.rollback: Remove the audit runner and plan files

commands: python -m bandit -r scouting-ai-service/app scouting-ai-service/adminplatform academy-ranking-ai-service/app n8n-service-orchestration/service-registry n8n-service-orchestration/webhooks chatbot/chatbot/apps -x chatbot/chatbot/apps/chat/tests_comprehensive.py -f json -o production-audit/bandit-python-services.json

passed.result: 2 pytest tests passed with one warning about a test returning a tuple
Bandit completed with 0 findings in scanned app/service directories
pip-audit returned 0 known vulnerabilities for direct audited requirement files after updates

known_warnings: chatbot/chatbot/apps/chat/tests/test_service_integration.py::test_service_detection returns a tuple and emits PytestReturnNotNoneWarning

coverage.status: not fully measured in this bundled pass
coverage.note: Functional and security gates were prioritized; per-service coverage thresholds remain a follow-up gate.

security.bandit_status: 0 findings in scanned Python service directories

architecture_changes.summary: The platform now has repository-level CI gates, direct dependency audit automation, stronger local JWT handling in Scouting AI, explicit N8N timeout classification, and a repeatable local hardening runner. No service API was intentionally broken.
migration_path: Set JWT_SECRET, JWT_SECRET_KEY, ADMIN_JWT_SECRET, SCOUTING_SERVICE_TOKEN, ACADEMY_RANKING_AI_SERVICE_TOKEN, and APP_ENV in staging/prod before deployment
Run the GitHub Actions workflow in a branch PR and tune environment variables if CI differs from the local workstation
Generate lockfiles or SBOMs before declaring dependency scanning complete

remaining_no_go_items: Full distributed tracing, metrics, dashboards, and alert rules remain open
Database indexing and query-plan validation require a staging-like PostgreSQL dataset
Contract tests and generated OpenAPI compatibility checks remain partial
Load, stress, and chaos testing remain open
Flutter accessibility and analyzer burn-down remain open
Java/Flutter transitive CVE scanning and release SBOMs remain open
convergence_status: Partial. Critical local config/auth/dependency/SAST risks were reduced and repeatable gates were added. The repository is materially closer to production readiness, but enterprise production approval still requires staging validation, observability, database profiling, contract testing, and CSRF hardening.
